name: Almost Chess
author: AGP
description: Almost Chess (Ralph Betza, 1977): standard 8x8 chess, except each player's queen is replaced by a Chancellor (a.k.a. Marshall/Empress) that moves as a Rook OR a Knight (no diagonals). The Chancellor starts on the queen's square. Castling, en passant, pawn double-step, check/checkmate/stalemate and all standard draws apply; pawns promote to a Chancellor / Rook / Bishop / Knight. White (player 0) moves first.
